Problem This field indicates the reason the patient required hospitalization was due to other respiratory problem. 0 = Not Checked (No), 1 = Checked (Yes) CHAR 1 x x x x
M2430_HOSP_OTHER M2430 Hospital Reason- Other Than Above This field indicates the reason the patient required hospitalization was due to other than above reasons. 0 = Not Checked (No), 1 = Checked (Yes) CHAR 1 x x x x
M2430_HOSP_UK M2430 Hospital Reason- Reason Unknown This field indicates the reason the patient required
